name: openagent
description: AI Agent Development Platform - Supports multiple models (OpenAI/DeepSeek/Wenxin/Tongyi), knowledge base management, workflow automation, and enterprise-grade security. Built with Flask + Vue3 + LangChain, featuring one-click Docker deployment.
summaryZh: AI Agent Development Platform - Supports multiple models (OpenAI/DeepSeek/Wenxin/Tongyi), knowledge base management, workflow automation, and enterprise-grade security. Built with Flask + Vue3 + LangChain, featuring one-click Docker deployment. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合做推理服务、模型部署、性能优化的工程团队。
